# [PKT-PRV-074](task-0141): Provider Data Governance Monitoring

## Purpose

Implement provider data governance monitoring.

## Scope

- Monitoring logic
- Compliance checks
- Alerts

## Implementation

1. Implement monitoring
2. Add compliance checks
3. Add alerts

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Monitoring works
2. Compliance checked
3. Alerts sent
